subtitle: Ваша ситуационная комната решений — в любой момент созовите совет советников, выслушайте все стороны и примите решение.

ongoing.title: Текущие решения
ongoing.empty: Пока нет текущих решений. Нажмите «Начать совещание по решению», чтобы открыть.

intel.title: Свежие сводки
intel.empty: Ожидание подключения Командной версии — передача по локальной сети появится позже.

advisors.title: Совет советников
advisors.desc: Призовите в комнату в любой момент

hero.title: What needs your call today?
hero.subtitle: Pose one hard decision. CentaurAI seats a council of top AI advisors, lets them challenge each other, then returns the final call to you.
hero.commandTitle: State the decision to be judged
hero.placeholder: Example: Should we enter the Southeast Asia market this quarter? Budget, timing, risk appetite and non-negotiables can all be included.
hero.commandHint: The sharper the issue and constraints, the more useful the debate.

examples.market: Should we enter a new market now?
examples.product: Should this product direction be cut or doubled down?
examples.budget: Should next quarter's budget favor growth or R&D?
examples.crisis: How should we handle this public-risk incident?

recent.title: Decision table
recent.desc: Open recent councils, continue debate, or make the final call.
recent.empty: No decision has been seated yet. Start with one hard question above.

steps.debateDesc: Different models defend positions, attack weak assumptions, and revise.
steps.optionsDesc: The host turns the debate into comparable choices and trade-offs.
steps.archiveDesc: Your verdict produces minutes, a decision brief, and an action list.

emptyHint: Put one decision on the table. The advisors will argue from different seats, surface real trade-offs, and hand the final call back to you.
createSubtitle: Set the issue first, then seat AI advisors with different positions.
createMembersDesc: Pick the advisors for this decision. The first team-capable model becomes chief host.
namePlaceholder: Name this decision, e.g. “Q3 growth strategy”, “Pricing review”…
templatePlaceholder: Optional: start from a department template (presets the method & domain prompts)
deptPlaceholder: Pick a department (fixes the workflow & prompts)

room.topicPlaceholder: Put one decision on the table for the AI council to debate…
room.needAgents: You need one chief host and at least one advisor before opening debate.
room.pickHint: Choose one option above to make the call
room.pausedHint: The host is waiting for your direction — add constraints below or continue the debate.
room.runningHint: Advisors are arguing the issue. You can set constraints or redirect them anytime.
room.interjectPausePlaceholder: Set your direction: risk appetite, red lines, budget, timing, or preference…
room.interjectPlaceholder: Issue a constraint or redirect the council…

resolution.title: Verdict bench — make the final call
resolution.subtitle: {{count}} options awaiting verdict
resolution.optionMeta: Weigh upside, cost, and execution rhythm
resolution.chosenMeta: This option is now your recorded verdict

feed.title: Signal feed for decisions
feed.desc: Later this will sync key updates from CentaurAI Super Workbench and agent automation, so decision-worthy changes show up like a home feed.

marketSignal.title: Market team submitted a Southeast Asia competitor shift brief
marketSignal.body: Super Workbench detected three competitors changing local channel policies. Consider opening a market-entry decision.

salesDigest.title: Sales agent summarized this week’s enterprise blockers
salesDigest.body: Automation found recurring doubts around deployment timeline and data compliance. Legal, delivery, and growth advisors should review together.

riskAlert.title: Operations automation flagged an execution risk
riskAlert.body: Several tasks depend on one key owner. If delays continue next week, the Q3 release plan may need reprioritization.
